name: Baddeley, Milton & Norton
description:
This is the most easterly area of Stoke-on-Trent and is bordered by the Staffordshire Moorlands, the area is now almost entirely residential with a mix of housing including council, Victorian terraced and large detached homes

There is a great deal of open space in the area and the A53 trunk road links the Staffordshire Moorlands and the Peak district with the rest of the City.
